sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14245" key="a)pofortismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποφορτ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n14245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unloading</tr_>: hence of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomiting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:23:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.23.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
